title: [circt-verilog][arcilator] Inconsistent compilation behavior: direct array indexing in always_ff sensitivity list vs. intermediate wire

features.name: direct array indexing in always_ff sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with array element used directly in posedge sensitivity list

features.name: intermediate wire workaround for array indexing in sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include a wire assignment feeding an always_ff posedge sensitivity list as a workaround for direct array indexing
features.snippet: wire clkin_0 = clkin_data[0]; wire rst = clkin_data[32]; always_ff @(posedge clkin_0) begin if (!rst) _00_ <= 6'h00; else _00_ <= in_data[7:2]; end

features.name: array element as clock in posedge sensitivity
features.description: Code should include an array element used as clock signal in posedge of always_ff sensitivity list
